title: jaltomata antillana
intro: Jaltomata antillana, also known as the Antillean jaltomata or purple bell, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Jaltomata antillana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
